basic_details.job_title: CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR Central Food Technological Research Institute
basic_details.short_information: CSIR Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI) has released the official Senior Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate I Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 40 years of age with an M.Sc. in Botany or Biochemistry with 3 years of experience or a Doctoral Degree in Botany or Biochemistry with 2 years of experience can apply online on or before 31 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years; OBC: 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Botany or Biochemistry with 3 years experience OR Doctoral Degree in Botany or Biochemistry with 2 years experience
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Botany or Biochemistry with 3 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial or Science & Technology Organisations OR Doctoral Degree in Science (Botany or Biochemistry) from a recognised university with 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial or Science & Technology Organisations.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR CFTRI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate I Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in Botany or Biochemistry with 3 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial or Science & Technology Organisations OR Doctoral Degree in Science (Botany or Biochemistry) from a recognised university with 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial or Science & Technology Organisations.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years; OBC: 3 years

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Botany or Biochemistry with 3 years of experience, or a Doctoral Degree in Botany or Biochemistry with 2 years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Project Associate-I post is 40 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 42,000/- plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Project Associate-I position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official CSIR CFTRI website.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for the Senior Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, which will contain detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Senior Project Associate-I is on a contractual basis.
